title: Trinity School celebrates learners' achievements
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Advertorial","html":"Advertorial"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Knysna-based Trinity School hosted its annual merit award ceremony on Tuesday 5 November, marking a memorable evening of celebration, recognition and inspiration.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Knysna-based Trinity School hosted its annual merit award ceremony on Tuesday 5 November, marking a memorable evening of celebration, recognition and inspiration."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Anglican Church Hall came alive with joyful energy as learners eagerly awaited acknowledgment for their hard work and growth throughout the year.","html":"The Anglican Church Hall came alive with joyful energy as learners eagerly awaited acknowledgment for their hard work and growth throughout the year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Proud parents and dedicated educators filled the room, each playing an important role in supporting the learners' journeys","html":"Proud parents and dedicated educators filled the room, each playing an important role in supporting the learners' journeys"},{"type":"heading","text":"A message of courage and growth","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"At Trinity, we believe every milestone begins with courage,\"said Clinton Louw, Trinity School's principal.","html":"\"At Trinity, we believe every milestone begins with courage,\"said Clinton Louw, Trinity School's principal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The courage to try, to grow and to keep going even when things feel hard. Our merit awards ceremony was a celebration of exactly that: the persistence, resilience, and quiet determination that our learners have shown throughout the year.","html":"\"The courage to try, to grow and to keep going even when things feel hard. Our merit awards ceremony was a celebration of exactly that: the persistence, resilience, and quiet determination that our learners have shown throughout the year."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Congratulations to all our learners on their well-deserved achievements and for embodying the values that make Trinity a place of courage, growth and belonging.\"","html":"\"Congratulations to all our learners on their well-deserved achievements and for embodying the values that make Trinity a place of courage, growth and belonging.\""},{"type":"heading","text":"Honouring learners and educators","level":"h3"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The evening featured heartfelt moments of recognition and gratitude as the school community came together to honour both learner achievements and the passionate educators who inspire and nurture them daily.","html":"The evening featured heartfelt moments of recognition and gratitude as the school community came together to honour both learner achievements and the passionate educators who inspire and nurture them daily."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A heartwarming performance by the Trinity choir added to the celebratory spirit, followed by the much-anticipated announcement of the 2026 student leaders, a proud and defining moment for many.","html":"A heartwarming performance by the Trinity choir added to the celebratory spirit, followed by the much-anticipated announcement of the 2026 student leaders, a proud and defining moment for many."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The evening featured heartfelt moments of recognition and gratitude as the school community came together to honour both learner achievements and the passionate educators.","html":"The evening featured heartfelt moments of recognition and gratitude as the school community came together to honour both learner achievements and the passionate educators. "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
